description_for_human: Send AI-guided photo requests and receive review-ready briefs.
description_for_model: PhotoBrief turns a single shareable link into a complete, AI-quality-checked photo brief. Use this plugin to create photo requests on behalf of a business, retrieve recipient URLs to forward by SMS or email, and look up plan limits, pricing, and FAQ content. Recipients never need to install an app. The plugin authenticates with a bearer API key issued on the Business plan.
